mission.title: helm: Fail strict lints when unused values are provided
mission.description:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:

closes #6422 (Which actually closed due to inactivity, but I'm implementing a fix here)

When an unused value is passed into the chart, a strict lint will throw an error. For example, given the chart, a `helm lint --strict` will fail.

```
# templates/configmap.yaml
kind: ConfigMap
apiVersion: v1
metadata:
  name: example-chart
  namespace: example-chart
  labels:
    team: infrastructure
    chart_name: {{ $.Chart.Name }}
    chart_version: {{ $.Chart.Version }}
  annotations:
    deleteme: "if found"
```

```
# values.yaml
super:
  unused: REQUIRED
  value:
    that: REQUIRED
    is_not: REQUIRED
  used:
    ever: REQUIRED
```

Here's an example output of what'll happen with the extra, unused values.

```

❯ /usr/local/bin/helm lint --strict example-chart
==> Linting example-chart
[INFO] Chart.yaml: icon is recommended
[ERROR] templates/: there are unused fields in values files [.Values.super.unused .Values.super.used.ever .Values.super.value.

resolution.summary:
This is a great initiative! We're very interested in being able to take advantage of such a feature.
What's the status of this work? Is it blocked? Abandoned?
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
# templates/configmap.yaml
kind: ConfigMap
apiVersion: v1
metadata:
  name: example-chart
  namespace: example-chart
  labels:
    team: infrastructure
    chart_name: {{ $.Chart.Name }}
    chart_version: {{ $.Chart.Version }}
  annotations:
    deleteme: "if found"

# values.yaml
super:
  unused: REQUIRED
  value:
    that: REQUIRED
    is_not: REQUIRED
  used:
    ever: REQUIRED

❯ /usr/local/bin/helm lint --strict example-chart
==> Linting example-chart
[INFO] Chart.yaml: icon is recommended
[ERROR] templates/: there are unused fields in values files [.Values.super.unused .Values.super.used.ever .Values.super.value.is_not .Values.super.value.that]

Error: 1 chart(s) linted, 1 chart(s) failed
